title: GUDECA-US CHAPTER Celebrated a Grand Cultural Event to Welcome HRH Fon Fomuki in the US
excerpt: In a momentous occasion on July 29, 2023, the Guneku Indigenes, gathered under GUDECA-US CHAPTER, organized an extraordinary event to extend a warm welcome to His Royal Highness (HRH) Fon Fomuki in…
body:
In a momentous occasion on July 29, 2023, the Guneku Indigenes, gathered under GUDECA-US CHAPTER, organized an extraordinary event to extend a warm welcome to His Royal Highness (HRH) Fon Fomuki in the United States. The festivities were a vibrant display of the rich Guneku culture, marking a significant stride in preserving and promoting their unique heritage. The day's activities were diverse and impactful, underscoring the community's dedication to its cultural roots. Here are the highlights:

Reception of the Paramount Fon of Guneku: GUDECA-US CHAPTER orchestrated a majestic reception to welcome HRH Fon Fomuki to the United States. Esteemed community members, leaders, and well-wishers gathered to honor the distinguished guest. Fundraising for Guneku Palace Renovation: A crucial segment of the event focused on fundraising for the renovation of the Guneku Palace. The community's generosity shone through, with funds exceeding an impressive $20,000. This financial support will play a pivotal role in the restoration and enhancement of this significant cultural landmark.

Promotion of Meta Culture: The event served as a vibrant platform to actively promote the Meta culture of Guneku. Through exhibitions, presentations, and interactive sessions, participants gained a profound understanding of the unique customs, traditions, and values defining the Guneku people. This initiative underscores GUDECA-US CHAPTER's commitment to preserving and disseminating their cultural heritage. The celebration transcended local boundaries, drawing participants from Cameroon, Europe, the United States, and Canada. The showcased cultural diversity, coupled with lively traditional dances, created an atmosphere of unity and shared identity.

Mr. Ephraim Toh, spokesperson for GUDECA-US CHAPTER, expressed gratitude for the overwhelming support and participation. "This event exemplifies our commitment to preserving our heritage and fostering unity within the Guneku community. We extend our heartfelt appreciation to everyone who contributed to the success of this grand celebration." GUDECA-US CHAPTER is poised to build on the momentum generated by this event, continuing their efforts to promote and sustain the rich cultural tapestry of Guneku for future generations.
